2170060.name: SCP: Submerged
2170060.description:
Leagues beneath the North Sea... don't even bother holding your breath.

THE WEIGHT OF THE OCEAN

Some secrets were meant to be drowned.

Leagues beneath the freezing North Sea, SCP: Submerged plunges you into the claustrophobic nightmare of a deep-sea containment facility. You play as Dr. Bree, a Foundation researcher who finds herself trapped as horrifying entities are let loose in the halls. The crushing pressure of the ocean isn't the only thing trying to get in—and your fellow survivors aren't the only things hiding in the dark.

KEY FEATURES

  • Linear Psychological Horror: Experience a focused, narrative-driven story where every corridor feels tighter than the last. There is no open world here—only the slow march into the dark.

  • The Pressure of Paranoia: In a facility where deep breaths and safe spaces are luxuries, the lines between ally and enemy blur. Meet a cast of survivors who are all pushed to their absolute breaking point.

  • Atmospheric Immersion: Feel the cold dampness of the walls through sound design and environmental storytelling. The groans of the failing facility structure are your constant companion.

  • A New SCP Canon: Experience familiar lore with fresh new twists and surprises. Explore the unique lore of the North Sea Branch universe.

TRUST IS A SCARCE RESOURCE

As the facility floods and the lights flicker out, the Foundation’s mission remains: Secure. Contain. Protect. But when the "Security" is gone and "Containment" has failed, who is left to "Protect" you?

When every breath is stolen from the same thinning supply, your greatest threat might not be the broken containment glass—it might be the person who smashed it.
